channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Eko 1150 violin bass 1962 - Madreperla — $1,134.45
item.description:
$1,134.45 · Good · Outlet di strumenti di Davide

Basso Elettrico Eko 1150 violin bass. Rara Colorazione madreperla. Presenta leggera patina sulle meccaniche.. suono spettacolare.

Anno 1962 - Made in Italy.

item.title: Ibanez EDA900- Ergodyne Bass 1990 - Silver Flat — $625
item.description:
$625 · Very Good · Iguana MUSIC

The EDA900 is an Ergodyne series solid body electric bass model introduced by Ibanez for 2001. It was produced in South Korea by Cor-Tek.

The EDA900 features a luthite body bolted to a maple neck with a 24-fret rosewood fingerboard with offset abalone dot position markers at the twelfth fret and white side dots. The body has a sculpted, asymmetrical double cutaway design with distinctive, narrow, curving horns; the logo is inlaid into the guitar top between the pickup and bridge. Components include a single "Ibanez Dynamix Full Range" DFR-N5 pickup mounted halfway between the bridge, an EQA-PZ system EQ with piezo active tone control, a Mono-rail II bridge with individual volume adjustable polyphonic piezo saddle pickups and 16.5mm string spacing, a barrel-style stereo output jack, a plastic nut and die-cast tuning machines.

item.title: Yamaha BB234 2010s - Yellow Natural Satin — $199
item.description:
$199 · Good · Henry's Gear Outlet

Fully functional 4-string Yamaha BB234 bass. Some small cosmetic imperfections on the bottom side of the bass by the jack. Plays great, just selling it because I bought a new bass.

item.title: Fender American Elite Jazz Bass 4-string J-Bass with Case 2016 - Black / Maple neck — $1,599
item.description:
$1,599 · Very Good · Atomic Music

This is a pre-owned/used instrument available as shown for local delivery, pickup at our storefront (curbside or in store) in Beltsville, Maryland, or shipment to those in the lower 48/USA only via UPS Ground [a signature will be required for delivery]*.

  • Its electronics have been tested and function 100% as they should.
  • See the provided pix for best idea of overall cosmetic condition. As it is pre-owned, it has acquired light surface marks and wear (dings, dents, scratches, scuffs, smudges, etc.) from play/use - all purely cosmetic in nature. There are no issues to note with regard to functionality and playability.
  • Its original hard case will be included, as shown.  No other extras are available for this item.
  • This listing has been created for the benefit of our local customers.  There may be cosmetic or functional issues that the pictures alone cannot capture — if you are not able to come by and inspect this instrument in person, please be sure to ask any relevant questions you may have regarding its condition, playability, etc. before buying.

* Please be aware that humidity, temperature, and handling can affect guitars & basses such that adjustments to the instrument might be needed post-shipment. This includes "fret sprout" (as wood shrinks/swells during shipment, a fretted instrument may arrive with sharp fret edges). If tweaking action, intonation, etc., having fret edges dressed, or having the instrument set up to your specs is not something you are comfortable with doing yourself, you will need the help of a local-to-you tech/professional. Note that any associated fees incurred for their time and labor will be your responsibility.

Please contact us to discuss any other questions you may have about it before clicking the "Add To Cart" button!


Atomic Music store hours:  12pm - 6pm, EST, Monday - Saturday & 12pm - 5pm, EST, Sundays.

Thanks!!

- Atomic Music

item.title: RICKENBACKER - BASSE STEREO 4003 W/C MG - GRI 4003MG — $3,103.81
item.description:
$3,103.81 · Brand New · Hurricane Music

Le grain Rickenbacker, en stéréo

La Rickenbacker 4003 est une basse iconique au caractère immédiatement reconnaissable : attaque franche, médiums présents et définition parfaite pour percer dans un mix. Cette version Mapleglo met en valeur l’érable et s’adresse aux bassistes qui veulent une signature sonore vintage avec la fiabilité d’un instrument moderne.

Grâce à sa sortie stéréo, vous pouvez séparer les micros pour traiter chaque source différemment (deux amplis, deux chaînes d’effets, enregistrement multipiste). La construction manche traversant apporte sustain et stabilité, et l’étui rigide inclus sécurise les déplacements.

Caractéristiques
  • Corps : érable
  • Manche : érable, traversant avec skunk stripe
  • Touche : palissandre des Caraïbes, non verni
  • Repères : triangulaires
  • Electronique : sortie stéréo
  • Barres de réglage : double truss rod 2 voies
  • Nombre de Frettes : 20
  • Diapason : 845 mm
  • Largeur du Sillet : 42,9 mm
  • Micro Manche : simple bobinage basse
  • Micro Chevalet : simple bobinage basse avec capot ouvert et repose-pouce
  • Mécaniques : Schaller Deluxe
  • Couleur : Mapleglo
  • Poids : env. 4,1 kg
  • Etui/Housse : étui rigide inclus

item.title: Vintage Precision Bass Luthier Project — $199
item.description:
$199 · Non Functioning · Guitar Buyer

Sold as is, untested, as pictured. Selling this vintage P-Bass for a repair project. This bass is very heavy. The fretboard has a hairline crack, from the nut to the 2nd fret.

Missing the pickguard assembly and a tuning key. The body top is damaged where the end of the pickguard mounts. Circled on the 2nd photo.

I will include a tuning key for the one that is missing.

I will be removing the neck from the body and padding each piece separately in a box. If you do not have someone who can put it back together, please refrain from bidding.

item.title: Vintage Memphis Precision Bass Luthier Project — $265
item.description:
$265 · Non Functioning · Guitar Buyer

Vintage Memphis P Bass repair project. Missing pickguard and its controls. Pickup is included.

I will be removing the neck from the body and padding each piece separately in a box. If you do not have someone who can put it back together, please refrain from bidding.

item.title: Yamaha BBP34 Pro Series 2018 - 2020 - Vintage Sunburst — $1,234
item.description:
$1,234 · Excellent · Max's Gear Depot

Excellent condition

item.title: Lakland Skyline 55-02 Deluxe Bass 2023 - Transparent Black — $1,300
item.description:
$1,300 · Excellent · Max's Gear Depot

Very good condition

item.title: Ken Smith HF5 E 2026 - Frost Gold — $4,100
item.description:
$4,100 · Brand New · Bass Japan Direct

This MIJ Hadrien Feraud Burner sports two very cool new colors in this line up for 2026.

This model has Hadrien's preferred preamp and control set, with the added mid control to get that warm, fat creamy burp on the rear pickup. It produces rich mids and focused lows, while the highs are nice and clear but solid.

Wonderful character, ideal for jazz, funk and fusion players.

The action is super smooth and low with very accurate intonation and great sustain.

Body. Solid ash

Neck. 3 pc maple

Fretboard. Ebony

Frets. 24 stainless steel

Grip. Thin D

Tuners. OEM by Gotoh

Bridge. OEM Ken Smith original

Preamp. Original 3 band

Controls. Vol/bypass, bal, treble, bass, mid

Weight. 4.3kg average

Case. High grade semi-hard case by Music Area

item.title: Gibson Les Paul Junior Tribute DC Bass Ebony — $999
item.description:
$999 · Very Good · Ryan’s Boutique

In near mint condition. The only thing I can see on it is a single small scratch on the back of the body.

Comes with it's original case, strap, and cardboard box.

item.title: Jackson X Series CBXNT IV Concert Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2016 - 2018 - Satin Black — $450
item.description:
$450 · Fair · Max's Gear Depot

Very good condition, just has cosmetic damage on the back

item.title: Ken Smith HF5 E 2026 - Sherwood Green — $4,100
item.description:
$4,100 · Brand New · Bass Japan Direct

This MIJ Hadrien Feraud Burner sports two very cool new colors in this line up for 2026.

This model has Hadrien's preferred preamp and control set, with the added mid control to get that warm, fat creamy burp on the rear pickup. It produces rich mids and focused lows, while the highs are nice and clear but solid.

Wonderful character, ideal for jazz, funk and fusion players.

The action is super smooth and low with very accurate intonation and great sustain.

Body. Solid ash

Neck. 3 pc maple

Fretboard. Ebony

Frets. 24 stainless steel

Grip. Thin D

Tuners. OEM by Gotoh

Bridge. OEM Ken Smith original

Preamp. Original 3 band

Controls. Vol/bypass, bal, treble, bass, mid

Weight. 4.3kg average

Case. High grade semi-hard case by Music Area

item.title: Spector Euro 4 RST 2021 - Turquoise Tide — $1,941
item.description:
$1,941 · Very Good · mathmusicoverlord

Beautiful Turquoise Tide Matte finish over a flame maple top. 34" scale, neck-thru construction with a 3-piece roasted maple neck and fingerboard, graphite rod reinforcement.

Electronics: Aguilar Super Double 4SD-D1 pickups with active Aguilar OBP-2 preamp.

Hardware: Chrome throughout — Gotoh tuners, Spector locking bridge, Dunlop strap locks (original strap buttons included).

Weight: 7 lbs 0.5 oz — extremely lightweight for a Euro 4.

Condition: Recently set up and playing great. Straight neck, truss rod functioning properly both directions. Frets in excellent shape with minimal wear. Plays cleanly across the entire fingerboard. Some wear on the rear wing and a chip on the back of the headstock, see photos.

Includes Spector padded gig bag.

These are top-tier instruments — premium build quality, electronics, and hardware. At this weight, you can wear it all night. Don't sleep on it.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Bongo 5 HH 2019 - Fuschia Flake w/ Custom Pickguard — $3,200
item.description:
$3,200 · Excellent · Doc Bass Gear Emporium

Excellent condition. Comes with original hard case. Hard case is showing a little patina on the latches, but still structurally sound for protecting the bass - much better than the gig bags EBMM is supplying with new instruments.

Killer sound bass. Huge tonal variety with the HH configuration the powerful 4-band preamp brings thundering lows (amazing low B) with plenty of high end clarity, and mids to cut through for days! I've played other Bongos as well, and ebony is definitely my favorite fingerboard! Lightweight, balances well, and the fuschia flake is absolutely stunning.

Comes with original white pickguard, and a custom Psychadelic Paisley pickguard made by Mike Quick / QuickGuards. It has a little bit of metallic in it, and goes killer with the bass. These bassees do not come along often, and this pickguard makes it one of a kind!!!

Only selling to help fund a custom bass. I have a few basses I am selling, but do not need to sell them all. Once I sell what I need to, I will pull the rest. Check out my other listings, and if you see something, get it while you can!!

If you have any questions, please let me know. I pride myself on open and honest listings, and have sold a number of instruments over Reverb in the last couple years. I have worked hard to make sure my buyers are happy, and I am proud to say the feedback speaks for itself!

$100 shipping to lower 48 states (and I will still probably have to cover some of it depending where it is going). Shipping is a little high because of the size of the case, but will be shipped very well packed and protected (check my feedback! :) ), and will be covered with Reverb Safe Shipping.

item.title: Charvel by Jackson 3B 1980’s - Ferrari Red — $1,500
item.description:
$1,500 · Very Good · Jamey's Boutique

1986 Charvel/Jackson Model 3B Bass guitar. MIJ neck through. All original and working electronics and OHSC. She’s a beauty.

item.title: Ibanez 250th USA Anniversary Premium SR5A250 5-String Electric Bass Guitar W/ Gig Bag — $1,299.99
item.description:
$1,299.99 · Brand New · Sound of Music

:

  • Description:
  • Product Subtype: Bass Guitars
  • Weight:
  • Series: SR5A250 250th Anniversary
  • Orientation: Right handed
  • Color: Red, White, and Blue
  • Case Bag: Gig bag
  • Type: SR5A250 250th Anniversary

  • Neck Finish: Oil
  • Neck Shape: Atlas-5
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • Fingerboard Radius: 12"

  • Neck Pickup: Nordstrand Big Break

  • EQ: 3-band active EQ

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Ball Family Reserve StingRay 5H - Kinetic Blue — $2,995
item.description:
$2,995 · Excellent · Doc Bass Gear Emporium

Excellent condition. Comes with original hard case. Hard case has a couple small cracks in it, but still structurally sound for protecting the bass - much better than the gig bags EBMM is supplying with new instruments.

Killer Stingray sound, with great tonal variety from the 3 way switch. Lightweight with beautiful ebony board and stunning color-changing Kinetic Blue finish. One of only 85 made!

Only selling to help fund a custom bass. I have a few basses I am selling, but do not need to sell them all. Once I sell what I need to, I will pull the rest. Check out my other listings, and if you see something, get it while you can!!

If you have any questions, please let me know. I pride myself on open and honest listings, and have sold a number of instruments over Reverb in the last couple years. I have worked hard to make sure my buyers are happy, and I am proud to say the feedback speaks for itself!

$100 shipping to lower 48 states (and I will still probably have to cover some of it depending where it is going). Shipping is a little high because of the size of the case, but will be shipped very well packed and protected (check my feedback! :) ), and will be covered with Reverb Safe Shipping.

item.title: Ibanez GSRM20SLB GSR Mikro Electric Bass Starlight Blue Finish W/ Bag — $169
item.description:
$169 · Excellent · Haight Ashbury Music Center

Ibanez GSRM20SLB GSR Mikro Electric Bass Starlight Blue Finish W/ Bag

Natty Mikro Bass from Ibanez! Tested in-store, works and sounds great with no issues. Very clean, no dings/dents/scratches. Includes padded gig bag.

Description:

GSRs offer famous Soundgear sleekness comfort tone and playability. GSR Mikro basses are perfect for anyone who needs a compact axe or the comfort of a smaller neck.

SPECS

  • Neck Material Maple
  • Neck Type: 28.6" scale GSRM4
  • Body: Mahogany body
  • Frets: Medium frets
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood
  • Inlay: Pearl dot inlay
  • Bridge: B10 bridge
  • Neck: PUSTD P
  • Bridge: PUSTD J
  • HW Color: Chrome

item.title: 2024 Yamaha BB735A 5-String Bass - Matte Translucent Black — $749
item.description:
$749 · Excellent · Grayson's Tune Town

  • Alder/maple/alder body construction
  • 6-Bolt miter neck joint
  • 5-Piece neck
  • YGD custom V7 Pickups (Alnico V)
  • 3-Band active EQ
  • Battery alert LED
  • Vintage Plus with convertible bridge and saddles
  • Lightweight open-gear tuners
  • Bag Not Included
  • Weight: 10 lbs 0 oz.

item.title: Fender Player II Mustang Bass PJ - Rallye Orange — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Brand New · Grayson's Tune Town

Description

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Mustang® Bass PJ — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Mustang® Bass PJ radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil P bass® and Single-Coil J bass® pickups offer sweet highs, growling mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. The 3-way toggle switch lets you easily dial in everything this versatile pickup set has to offer, while an adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Mustang® Bass PJ has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

Features
  • Alder Body
  • Modern "C" Neck Profile
  • 9.5“-Radius Maple or Rosewood Fingerboard with Rolled Edges
  • Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil Precision Bass® and Alnico V Single-Coil Jazz Bass® Pickups
  • 4-Saddle Bridge with Single-Groove Steel “Barrel” Saddles
  • Open-Gear Tuning Machines
  • 7 lbs 15 oz.

item.title: Yamaha NNBE2 Nathan East Signature 5-String Electric Bass Black with Case — $4,099.99
item.description:
$4,099.99 · Very Good · Truetone Music

Nathan East Signature Model

Featuring neck-through construction, the two-octave neck is built from maple and mahogany with an ebony fingerboard inlaid with figured mother-of-pearl. The unique BB body is made of maple and alder for a fat sound with plenty of definition. The BPZ-7 bridge features individual machined saddles that provide precise intonation, a low profile, and an elegant look. The stacked Alnico humbuckers run through Yamaha's 5-control active electronics, which feature a custom 3-band EQ with a switchable mid-cut to provide sonic versatility for any situation.

BBNE2 Nathan East Signature Model

Nathan East has appeared on countless albums and has toured with some of the biggest names in modern music. Whether he is playing blues with Eric Clapton, pop with Phil Collins or contemporary jazz with Fourplay, Nathan relies on his BBNE2 signature five-string bass to deliver the tone he needs.

FEATURES 5-Piece Neck Through design

The neck through design uses a 5-piece maple and mahogany neck sandwiched between the maple on alder body.

    Contoured Body

    Both the front and back of the bass body are contoured to provide players with a compact, well fitting instrument that offers greater playing comfort.

      Pickups

      The stack type pickups are designed in collaboration with Nathan East. The Alnico V pickups include hum-canceling coils.

        Individual Bridge Pieces

        The bridge consists of Individual bridge pieces that reduce interference from other string vibration delivering a purer tone.

          Active Electronics

          Active electronics include a special equalizer circuit based on Nathan East's "Magic Box." The circuit lets you cut off the selected mid frequency at the touch of a switch for precision sound tailoring.

            Controls

            1 : Pickup Balancer

            2 : Master Volume

            3 : Bass

            4 : Middle

            5 : Treble

            6 : Mid Cut Frequency

            7 : Mid Cut On/Off Switch

            General Specifications General Construction: Neck Through Scale Length: 34" (863.6 mm)
            Body Body Materials: Maple / Alder Body Finish: Gloss Polyurethane
            Neck Neck Materials: Maple / Mahogany 5-Piece Neck Finish: Gloss Polyurethane Fingerboard Materials: Ebony Fingerboard Radius: 23-5/8" (600 mm) Fret Wire: Medium Number of Frets: 24 Nut Materials: Bone Width @ 0 Fret / 12th Fret: 43 / 64.7 mm Thickness @ 1st Fret / 12th Fret: 20.3 / 23.7 mm
            Electronics Neck Pickup: Yamaha Custom Stack Type / Alnico V Middle Pickup: - Bridge Pickup: Yamaha Custom Stack Type / Alnico V Controls: Master Volume, P.U. Balancer, 3-Band EQ (Bass, Middle, Treble), Mid Cut Frequency Controls, Mid Cut On/Off Switch Pickup Switch: -
            Hardware Bridge: Yamaha Original Bridge String Spacing: 18 mm Tailpiece: - Tuning Machines: Gotoh GB72 Pickguard: - Others: String Gauge: D'Addario EXL170-5 / 0.045-0.130 (5 strings) Case: Hardshell Case

            SKU: BBNE2 BLACK

item.title: Yamaha SA-70 SA Bass MIJ 1967-72 w/OHSC ***STUNNING*** in Original 'Pearl Marine Blue' ***VERY RARE*** — $4,949.31
item.description:
$4,949.31 · Very Good · VEJ Guitars

YAMAHA SA-70 VINTAGE JAPAN SEMI-ACOUSTIC BASS

****VERY RARE *** 'PEARL MARINE BLUE'  w/OHSC (1967-72)


Exceptionally rare metallic 'Pearl Marine Blue' SA-70 bass.

Fantastic to play and sounds superb. 



Condition-wise...

Overall, very good. Close to excellent.

Some minor blemishes to the head and body (see photos) but it's in lovely shape all round.

Binding are all very clean. Neck is superb.

Fretboard is in lovely shape, frets are good with plenty of life. 


Just back from a full pro setup. It's now even more stunning. We just replaced the pots and fitted a new nut.


All-original hardware, pickups, guard, bridge etc. Even has the old mute foam.

Everything works smoothly inside and out. Tuners are smooth & positive and the overhauled electrics are faultless. 

Strings are new.

The Original Yamaha vintage case is a bit tatty but no major damage and the hinges and catches work. It's done its job and can continue to do so.



In Summary...

This is a highly collectable & very rare bass in great condition with its original hard case.

Professionally set up and ready to go.

It plays beautifully, fingering and intonation are great. It sounds just as stunning as it looks.


Original Hard Case (pictured) included.


Specs:

  • Yamaha SA-70 SA Bass MIJ 1967-72 w/OHSC in Original 'Pearl Marine Blue' Finish ***VERY RARE***
  • Hollow, double-bound body w/baffled F-holes
  • Maple top, back and sides 
  • 20 fret short/medium scale neck 
  • 41.5mm Nut (New)
  • Double-bound rosewood fretboard w/split MOP inlays
  • Original hardware incl black button open tuners, tailpiece, adjustable bridge & mute
  • 2 original Yamaha pickups
  • Original Volume, Tone & Balancer pots
  • 3.7kg
  • OHSC included (pictured)

    *** WORLDWIDE SHIPPING AVAILABLE ***

Please contact us for a quote if your location is not listed.


Australia, Germany, Spain & Denmark Buyers:

Unfortunately the post office in these countries now limits package sizes so our regular EMS (Japan Post Office) shipping rates do not apply. (Unless we ship it disassembled). Please contact us for a quote.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Almost everything for sale here is coming from a 40+years personal collection. As the shop name suggests these are predominantly Vintage, Eclectic or Japanese - so if you are looking for something specific, please get in touch. Maybe we have got something you've been searching for. VEJ

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A Note On Shipping:

We want you to be fully satisfied with everything - from the item itself (naturally!) through the shipping, packaging, communication etc.

Of course there is nothing we can do about customs duty, local taxes etc at your end. But we can keep the overall price as competitive as is decently possible.

The Japan post office service (EMS) is reliable and efficient but shipping costs from Japan to Europe or the states are unavoidably expensive.

For this reason none of the shipping costs we quote reflect the actual price we have to pay. We are more than willing to take a hit on that to make things as attractive for you as possible.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Vintage Instruments & Equipment

Shipping by air plus climatic changes can affect how a guitar is set up - no matter how well it is packed. Consequently there is no guarantee that an instrument arrives with exactly the same set up as stated. After a period of acclimatisation, you may still need to make any adjustments at your own expense.

item.title: Rick Turner Renaissance RB4 Fretless 2017 - Natural — $2,450
item.description:
$2,450 · Excellent · The Bass Spot

The “Renaissance” series of acoustic electric basSses we’re designed by luthier Rik Turner to deliver the finest in “acoustic” tone in plugged in situations on stage or in recording studios. Our fretless basses in particular are known for being able to deliver extremely “acoustic” compatible tones, and the instruments can sound remarkably like upright basis when played for that kind of tone.

This instrument exceptional condition with no visible imperfections.

Here are the specifications:

Brand: Rick Turner

Model: RB4FL

# of strings: 4

Scale: 34”

Body material: Mahogany

Top Material: Cedar 

Body finish type: Gloss

Body finish color: Natural

Neck construction: Bolt on 

Neck material: 1 Piece Hard Rock Maple

# of frets: 22

Neck finish type: Satin

Fingerboard material: Ipe

Fingerboard radius: 14”

Nut material: Graphite

Side dot material: White dots

Fingerboard inlays: Lines

Bridge Pickup: Piezo - D-Tar Eclipse

Electronics: Piezo

Controls: Volume, Tone 

Bridge: Bone

String spacing at saddles:18 mm 

Tuners: Gotoh

Strap Buttons: Standard

Weight: 5.7  Lbs

Case: Access Stage 3

item.title: ARIA DIAMOND 1720 BASS c.1971 - w/HSC - UNIVOX HI-FLIER PHASE II MIJ — $1,200.82
item.description:
$1,200.82 · Excellent · VEJ Guitars

ARAI / ARIA DIAMOND 1720 - UNIVOX HI-FLIER PHASE II VINTAGE MIJ BASS c.1971 w/HSC *RARE*

Arai Diamond 1720 or (U.S.) Phase II Univox Hi-Flier bass made in Japan at the Matsumoku plant somewhere around 1971.

Beautifully made and superbly finished. This is Japanese guitar building at its best.


Condition-wise...

This is excellent for its age. The sunburst finish, neck and head are almost spotless.

No cracks, splits or repairs to the body which has only some pretty hard to spot grazes.

Some surface hairlines to the finish but these are purely cosmetic.


Fretboard is great, frets are high and hardware is all-original - pickups, controls, tuners, bridge etc.

Original chrome bridge cover is included, complete with some original mute foam.


These super P90-type pickups (actually powerful single coils) are very punchy and give these basses a sound and stature way beyond their pay grade.

Plays and sounds great. Really smooth and fast action.

This nails those vintage bass tones effortlessly. Serious depth on offer and a really versatile sound palette.

An absolute joy to play.


In summary...

A becoming-rare, high quality bass in super condition.

Superb Matsumoku golden-era build quality, fantastic pickups and a lovely fast and comfortable feel.


Comes with a very decent vintage hard case.

A beauty.


Specs:

  • Arai Diamond 1720 bass / (U.S.) Univox Hi-Flier Phase II
  • Mahogany body in original sunburst finish
  • Maple neck (30" scale)
  • Rosewood fingerboard (20 frets) w/large dot markers
  • Original hardware
  • Original tortoise scratchplate
  • Original Controls: 1 x Volume; 1 x Tone; 3-way selector
  • Comes with a vintage hard case (pictured)


*** WORLDWIDE SHIPPING AVAILABLE ***

Please contact us for a quote if your location is not listed.


Australia, Germany, Spain & Denmark Buyers:

Unfortunately the post office in these countries now limits package sizes so our regular EMS (Japan Post Office) shipping rates do not apply. (Unless we ship it disassembled). Please contact us for a quote.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Almost everything for sale here is coming from a 40+years personal collection. As the shop name suggests these are predominantly Vintage, Eclectic or Japanese - so if you are looking for something specific, please get in touch. Maybe we have got something you've been searching for. VEJ

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A Note On Shipping:

We want you to be fully satisfied with everything - from the item itself (naturally!) through the shipping, packaging, communication etc.

Of course there is nothing we can do about customs duty, local taxes etc at your end. But we can keep the overall price as competitive as is decently possible.

The Japan post office service (EMS) is reliable and efficient but shipping costs from Japan to Europe or the states are unavoidably expensive.

For this reason none of the shipping costs we quote reflect the actual price we have to pay. We are more than willing to take a hit on that to make things as attractive for you as possible.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Vintage Instruments & Equipment

Shipping by air plus climatic changes can affect how a guitar is set up - no matter how well it is packed. Consequently there is no guarantee that an instrument arrives with exactly the same set up as stated. After a period of acclimatisation, you may still need to make any adjustments at your own expense.

item.title: Epiphone Les Paul Bass - Translucent Black PROJECT — $189.99
item.description:
$189.99 · Non Functioning · Neil's Bass Collection

This is a non- working project bass. I bought it with the ambition of making it a great bass. I just don’t have the time to do anything to get the project started. It does not have pickups or a back cover plate. I will do my best to answer all questions.

item.title: Fodera Impérial MG — $7,164.92
item.description:
$7,164.92 · Excellent · Bapte brice

IImperial Elite MG Shape I54522NG Production Number: 7118 Serial Number: I54522NG Model: Imperial Elite MG Shape Strings: 5 Instrument Type: Bass-Solid Body Neck Construction: Neck-Through Body Scale Length: 33 » Fret Count: 24 Body Wood: Walnut Top Wood: Buckeye Burl Neck Wood: 3 Piece Ash Tone Block: Alder Fingerboard Wood: Ebony (see notes) Finish: Satin Finish Color: Clear Electronics: Emp/Imp, 3-Band (see notes) Electronics Layout: Matt Garrison Pickups: Seymour Duncan Dual Coils Bridge Spacing: 17.5mm Fingerboard Inlay: MOP Dots Birthday: 10/19/2017

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Stingray 5HH 2006 - Natural Gloss — $2,575.27
item.description:
$2,575.27 · Excellent · Ayden L

2006 Stingray 5HH in Natural Gloss finish.
There is some belt rash that can be observed on the backside, two very minor dings on the headstock and one extremely minor ding below the control plate that is incredibly hard to notice. Overall this bass is in beautiful condition considering its age of 20 years. This bass is a versatile workhorse with its HH configuration, signature Stingray growl with the addition of an articulate low B. The bass will be shipped with its OHSC.

item.title: G&L Tribute Series JB-2 Bass Guitar - NOS - Shell Pink — $599.99
item.description:
$599.99 · Excellent · Pop's Music

G&L Tribute Series JB-2 Bass Guitar - NOS - Shell Pink

The G&L Tribute Series JB-2 NOS (New Old Stock) in Shell Pink is a rare find for discerning bassists. This instrument combines G&L's legendary craftsmanship with the character of vintage inventory. The dual-pickup configuration—blending J-bass and P-bass designs—delivers a wide tonal palette from deep, resonant lows to bright, cutting highs. Built with a solid body and quality hardware, the JB-2 offers excellent sustain and playability for studio sessions and live gigs alike. The striking Sonic Blue finish adds visual appeal while the NOS status ensures you're getting an instrument with authentic vintage appeal and proven reliability. A standout choice for players seeking classic tone at a value price.

This guitar comes to us from our friends at MIRC (Musical Instrument Reclamation Corporation) in LaVergne, Tennessee. MIRC is the nation’s largest wholesaler of refurbished musical instruments, working directly with major manufacturers to give guitars and other gear a second life. Their technicians carefully inspect, repair, and restore instruments that may have had minor cosmetic flaws or shipping damage, ensuring they play and perform just like they should. It’s a great way to get a quality instrument at a better value while keeping perfectly good gear out of landfills.

item.title: Fender Player Jazz Bass with Maple Fretboard Black Upgraded — $549.99
item.description:
$549.99 · Very Good · B Major Music

Sounds and plays so good! Straight neck. Fully functional. Slight cosmetic blemishes, nothing major. Upgraded Electronics with Active features and double pots. Bridge also upgraded. Not sure the brand on the pickups. Sounds amazing.


Don't miss your chance to own!


Items only come with case or accessories if pictured or listed in the listing.

Items only come with accessories/parts pictured and or listed in the listing.

Items are all setup to play each note unless otherwise listed. Items may have to be setup by user for personal preference.


INTERNATIONAL BUYERS!! If the shipping price is very high for you we recommend you using a service such as Shipito or PlanetExpress which will provide you with a USA address and forward on to your country. These are well reviewed and offer great service. Message us if you need assistance. We can usually provide estimated weight and dimensions. Non-Continental USA send us a message.   


Returns are subject to 10% restocking fee. 

Returns will be required to have the original packaging supplies and shipping box. If you destroy or dispose of the packaging or shipping box you forfeit ability to return item for defects or any other reason. If item arrives in different condition than listing buyer must contact us and await further instructions. 


We are committed to excellence in serving you, if you have any questions feel free to message.


Your item will ship within 1-3 business days of payment received. Tracking provided.

Extra shipping outside lower 48 US States.


Thank you!

item.title: G&L Tribute Series Fallout Shortscale Bass - NOS - Surf Green — $749.99
item.description:
$749.99 · Excellent · Pop's Music

G&L Tribute Series Fallout Shortscale Bass - NOS - Surf Green

The G&L Tribute Series Fallout delivers classic short-scale bass tone in a compact, player-friendly package. This New Old Stock example in striking Surf Green showcases G&L's legendary craftsmanship at an accessible price point. The Fallout's shorter 30" scale makes it ideal for players with smaller frames or those seeking a vintage vibe without sacrificing playability. Featuring G&L's signature pickup design and solid construction, this bass cuts through with clarity and punch—perfect for rock, punk, and alternative styles. Surf Green finish adds character and visual appeal. As NOS (New Old Stock), this instrument represents a rare find for collectors and players seeking authentic G&L quality with that fresh-from-the-vault appeal.

This guitar comes to us from our friends at MIRC (Musical Instrument Reclamation Corporation) in LaVergne, Tennessee. MIRC is the nation’s largest wholesaler of refurbished musical instruments, working directly with major manufacturers to give guitars and other gear a second life. Their technicians carefully inspect, repair, and restore instruments that may have had minor cosmetic flaws or shipping damage, ensuring they play and perform just like they should. It’s a great way to get a quality instrument at a better value while keeping perfectly good gear out of landfills.

item.title: G&L Tribute Series JB-2 Bass Guitar - NOS - Sonic Blue — $599.99
item.description:
$599.99 · Excellent · Pop's Music

G&L Tribute Series JB-2 Bass Guitar - NOS - Sonic Blue

The G&L Tribute Series JB-2 NOS (New Old Stock) in Sonic Blue is a rare find for discerning bassists. This instrument combines G&L's legendary craftsmanship with the character of vintage inventory. The dual-pickup configuration—blending J-bass and P-bass designs—delivers a wide tonal palette from deep, resonant lows to bright, cutting highs. Built with a solid body and quality hardware, the JB-2 offers excellent sustain and playability for studio sessions and live gigs alike. The striking Sonic Blue finish adds visual appeal while the NOS status ensures you're getting an instrument with authentic vintage appeal and proven reliability. A standout choice for players seeking classic tone at a value price.

This guitar comes to us from our friends at MIRC (Musical Instrument Reclamation Corporation) in LaVergne, Tennessee. MIRC is the nation’s largest wholesaler of refurbished musical instruments, working directly with major manufacturers to give guitars and other gear a second life. Their technicians carefully inspect, repair, and restore instruments that may have had minor cosmetic flaws or shipping damage, ensuring they play and perform just like they should. It’s a great way to get a quality instrument at a better value while keeping perfectly good gear out of landfills.

item.title: Jackson JS Series JS3V 5-String Spectra Bass - Walnut Satin — $399.99
item.description:
$399.99 · Very Good · Pop's Music

Jackson JS Series JS3V 5-String Spectra Bass - Walnut Satin

The Jackson JS Series JS3V delivers professional-grade tone and playability at an accessible price point. This 5-string bass features a solid body with a stunning walnut satin finish that showcases natural wood grain while resisting fingerprints. The Spectra pickup configuration provides punchy, articulate output ideal for rock, metal, and modern genres. Precision-engineered hardware and a comfortable neck profile make extended playing sessions effortless. Whether you're upgrading from a starter bass or adding a versatile instrument to your collection, the JS3V combines Jackson's legendary craftsmanship with everyday affordability.

item.title: GLOBAL 495B BASS GUITAR SG EB3 SHORT SCALE LAWSUIT COPY CHERRY 1970'S JAPAN (USED) — $349.99
item.description:
$349.99 · Very Good · Harper's Music Store

GLOBAL 495B BASS GUITAR SG EB3 SHORT SCALE LAWSUIT COPY CHERRY 1970'S JAPAN (USED)

This is a Used Bass in Very Good Condition for it's age (1970's). One on the tuning keys has been replaced. One of the tuning machine ferrules is missing. It does have some fret wear - again typical).
It does not come with a case.

***PICKUP ONLY***

Here is some info from the web - please check for accuracy: 
   

The Global 495B is a vintage 1970s Japanese-made bass guitar, typically recognized as a "lawsuit-era" copy of the Gibson SG/EB-3 bass. These short-scale (30.5") instruments feature a laminated mahogany SG-style body, a rosewood fretboard, and distinct neck "mudbucker" pickups.
Instrument Profile & Specs
  • Origin: Made in Japan (MIJ), likely manufactured during the 1970s in the famous Matsumoku or related factories.
  • Design: Sculptured double-cutaway body (often cherry red), short scale length (approx. 30.25" to 30.5"), and a slim 1960s-style neck profile.
  • Electronics: Features twin pickups (including a neck mudbucker) and two selector switches.

item.title: Fender Standard Jazz Bass V Electric Bass Blue Lord of The Rings Gandalf Special Art — $749.99
item.description:
$749.99 · Very Good · B Major Music

YOU SHALL NOT PASS, this great instrument up! Sounds and plays so good! Straight neck. Fully functional. Slight cosmetic blemishes, nothing major. Has some unique and fun Lord of the Rings art under the finish around the edges of the bass and on the back. This is the one to rule them all.


Don't miss your chance to own!

item.title: Gibson EB-3 Cherry 1974 — $1,575
item.description:
$1,575 · Good · Chicago Music Exchange

The following specs were carefully collected and recorded by a skilled technician. For a more detailed description and questions regarding sound, feel, or cosmetic condition, please call to speak to one of our experts.

Summary

Body Material: Mahogany

Neck Material: Maple

Neck Profile: "C" profile

Neck Thickness (IN): .82" (1st fret), .98" (12th fret)

Fingerboard Radius: 12.00"

Nut Width: 1-5/8"

undefinedElectronics: Original Gibson pickups. The rotary tone switch has been replaced, and functions as a 3-position pickup selector switch. Some additional solder joints and ground connections in the wiring harness have been repaired. The pots are original, with 1974 date codes.

Pickup Measurements: N/A due to wiring

Weight: 9 lbs 4 oz

Cosmetic Condition: This vintage Gibson EB-3 bass shows moderate cosmetic wear, with checking, hazing, and various small blemishes on the glossy finish. There is repaired cracking around the output jack and control cavity, with a piece of mahogany missing. A larger washer has been added to the output jack.

Modifications/Repairs: Repaired cracks at the output jack, with added washer. The rotary switch has been replaced, and various electrical connections have been repaired.

Serial Number: 964612

Tech Notes: The bass plays well with medium-low action and light neck relief. The wide frets are low with minor wear. The construction, serial number, and pot codes date the bass to 1974.

Case Details: Hardshell Case

item.title: Fender Custom Shop 1960 Precision Bass Relic Super Faded Aged Charcoal Frost Metallic (Serial #CZ591609) — $4,775
item.description:
$4,775 · Brand New · Chicago Music Exchange

Since 1987, the Fender Custom Shop—affectionately known at CME as “The Dream Factory”—has grown to a band of over 50 veteran guitar artisans who take Leo Fender’s legacy to its utmost heights by bringing dream guitars and basses to life.

Taking an amp builder’s sensibility to instrument design, Leo Fender’s modular approach emphasized swappable components. This foundational design philosophy portended a future that we now inhabit, in which it’s not only easy to replace individual parts and maintain the longevity of each instrument—but, players also have the ability to customize every component of an instrument, giving them innumerable options when dreaming up their ideal guitar.

Here at Chicago Music Exchange, we’ve collaborated with the best minds at Fender to build the best instruments from top to bottom, tirelessly going over each spec to ensure that we offer you the best of what Fender has to offer—from neck shaping and fretwork to finishing and aging.

As a result of our ongoing collaboration, the instrument you see here is, of course, much more than the sum of its parts. Imbued with history, alive with the spirit and devotion of those who crafted it, this Fender Custom Shop creation is brimming with intangible, electrifying elements, that add new dimensions to every playing experience.



General:
Brand Name: Fender
Case Type: Hardshell Case
Hardware Color: Nickel/Chrome
Made in: Made in the USA
Number of Strings: 4-String
Product Color: Super Faded Aged Charcoal Frost Metallic
Relic or Aging Level: Relic
Serial Number: CZ591609
Series: Fender Custom Shop
Weight: 9lbs 2oz

Body:
Body Finish: Relic Lacquer Finish
Body Material: 2-Piece Select Alder Body
Body Shape: Precision Bass

Neck:
Fingerboard Inlay: Vintage Clay Dot
Fingerboard Material: 3A Rosewood Fingerboard
Neck Joint: 4 Bolt
Neck Material: Quartersawn Maple Neck with 1960 Precision Bass Oval "C" Back-Shape
Neck Shape: 1960 Precision Bass Oval "C" Back-Shape
Number of Frets: 20 Frets
Nut Material: Bone
Nut Width: 1.685" (42mm)
Side Marker Inlay: Dots
Truss Rod: Adjustable

Electronics:
Controls and Switching: Vintage Precision Bass Wiring

Hardware:
Bridge: 4-Saddle Vintage-Style Bridge
Fret Wire: 20 Jescar Vintage (45085) Frets
Knobs: Knurled Chrome
Pickguard: 4-Ply Tortoiseshell Pickguard
Saddle Material: Metal
String Tree: Vintage-Style Disc String Tree
Tuning Machines: Vintage-Style Tuning Machines

item.title: Squier Vintage Modified Jaguar Bass Special – 3-Tone Sunburst – 2013 – w/ Gig Bag & Strap — $165
item.description:
$165 · Fair · D. Womack's Gear

Squier Vintage Modified Jaguar Bass Special, manufactured July 2013 (model #0328900500), in 3-color sunburst with rosewood fingerboard. This model brings classic Fender Jaguar Bass styling into an affordable, versatile package, with an active bass-boost circuit for extra low-end punch on top of its vintage-style tone.

Key Specs:

  • Body: Basswood, polyurethane finish
  • Neck: Maple, satin urethane finish, "C" shape, 20 medium-jumbo frets
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood, 9.5" radius, white pearloid dot inlays
  • Scale length: 34" (long scale)
  • Pickups: Vintage-style split single-coil Precision Bass (middle) + standard single-coil Jazz Bass (bridge)
  • Controls: Volume (middle pickup), Volume (bridge pickup), Bass Boost, Master Tone
  • Bridge: 4-saddle vintage-style, chrome hardware
  • Nut: Synthetic bone, 1.5" width

Condition: Overall good playing condition with honest cosmetic wear consistent with normal use — light scratching on the pickguard and finish (see photos for close-up detail). Neck and frets are straight and in good shape.

Please note: The output jack has an electrical fault that causes feedback/noise when connected to an amp or mixer. This may just be a cleaning or tightening/re-solder job — a common and typically inexpensive fix — but I have not had it repaired myself, and the price reflects this. The active bass-boost circuit requires a 9V battery (not included) to function; passive tone/volume should work regardless.

Includes:

  • Squier Vintage Modified Jaguar Bass Special (3-color sunburst)
  • Padded gig bag (shows wear/repair on bottom seam — see photos)
  • Guitar strap

Buyer to confirm all details from photos, which are part of the listing. Message with any questions — happy to help before you buy.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special 5 H - Kiwi Green — $1,999.99
item.description:
$1,999.99 · Excellent · Jerry's Gear Locker

Very nice Music Man Stingray 5 H in gorgeous kiwi green finish. Pretty clean overall with some wear on the pickguard. The body and neck are pretty clean but I did notice one ding on the bottom edge. Comes with a nice Mono case/bag.

item.title: Jackson Electric Bass Performer PS-5 - Glossy Black - 2000's — $404.69
item.description:
$404.69 · Good · Musique Lévis

The item is used and may show some signs of wear, such as light scratches on the body, neck and headstock; possibility of light wear on the pick-ups, pick-guard, hardware (Such as the bridge, frets, fretboard, jack port, tuners and knobs); however nothing that may affect the performance and or the functionality of the Product. The guitar was tested and is in good working condition.

Comes in a hard case or guitar bag depending on availability (Ask us beforehand). The guitar upon arrival may need a tuning and light clean up, due to shipping and personal preferences.

Please look at all the pictures provided to have an idea of the condition, possibility of sending more if desired. If you have any questions, please do send them our ways; we will do our best to provide answers in a timely manner. We ship to both Canada and the United States.


Shipping cost includes a full coverage insurance and tracking number. We require a signature for items over 150$ CAD value. We use either UPS or Canada Post to ship, depending on your region, value of the item and dimensions. We are not responsible and have no control over any customs, tariffs, fees or more; Please read Reverb's terms and conditions for more information. Buyers located in the United States will have to pay import fees, the exact amount is unknown to us and will not be covered by us.


Returns are accepted only if the item is faulty, damaged or not as described. Refusal of delievery, refusal to pay fees (Import, brokerage, customs, tariffs, and more), change of mind and no longer needed are not valid reasons for a return; and so we will refuse the return request.


We communicate in both French and English.

item.title: Fender Player II Mustang Bass PJ 2024 - Present - Catus Grey — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Brand New · IHOMI

New drop! weighs 7.64 pounds new cactus grey color. Free shipping!

Description

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Mustang® Bass PJ — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Mustang® Bass PJ radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil P bass® and Single-Coil J bass® pickups offer sweet highs, growling mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. The 3-way toggle switch lets you easily dial in everything this versatile pickup set has to offer, while an adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Mustang® Bass PJ has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

Features

  • Alder Body
  • Modern "C" Neck Profile
  • 9.5“-Radius Maple or Rosewood Fingerboard with Rolled Edges
  • Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil Precision Bass® and Alnico V Single-Coil Jazz Bass® Pickups
  • 4-Saddle Bridge with Single-Groove Steel “Barrel” Saddles
  • Open-Gear Tuning Machines

item.title: Redeemer Basses Dr. Funk'n Jazillac 2026 - White Diamond Pearl — $3,850
item.description:
$3,850 · Brand New · Redeemer Bass Guitars

The Luxury Land Yacht of Tone: The Dr. Funk'n Jazillac Evolution:

Up for sale is a breathtaking, freshly completed, hand-constructed 2026 Redeemer Basses "Dr. Funk'n Jazillac" 4-string bass. This instrument is the absolute Cadillac of the jazz bass world, seamlessly blending elite, executive-level luxury with high-horsepower modern appointments, a stunning Escalade aesthetic, and ground-breaking onboard power engineering. If you want to cruise the low-end in absolute style, this is your ride.

Executive Luxury Visuals & Premium Ride Comfort:

The body is carved from premium, deep-resonating Mahogany and finished in a jaw-dropping, professionally sprayed Escalade White Diamond Pearl, sealed under a flawless, high-gloss 2K urethane clear coat. A brilliant white pearloid pickguard perfectly complements the finish, reflecting light like a showroom masterpiece.

The 34" scale bolt-on neck is a testament to master-level craftsmanship, constructed from gorgeous, flamed maple with a lightning-fast profile and an ultra-smooth gloss finish. It is paired with a matching flamed maple fingerboard sporting pristine white binding and premium pearloid rectangular position markers that radiate pure class. At the top of the neck sits a premium, fully adjustable 38mm brass nut, giving you perfect control over first-fret action and a brilliant, crisp open-string response. For ultimate structural reliability, the neck features a rock-solid 2-way truss rod.

Ergonomic Sculpted Heel Joint (Smooth Riding Suspension):

Forget the bulky, blocky heel joints of traditional factory builds. This bass features a meticulously massaged and sculpted neck heel and recessed body pocket contour where the neck meets the upper registry. By smoothly contouring both the mahogany body and the flamed maple neck in this area, your hand seamlessly transitions all the way up the 20-fret fingerboard with absolutely zero palm obstruction or wrist strain. Upper-fret access is effortless, fast, and incredibly comfortable.

High-Output Nordstrand Electronics & Pro Controls:

Under the hood, the Jazillac is packing serious muscle. It is loaded with a matched set of premium, hum-canceling Nordstrand Split-Coil Jazz Pickups, engineered to deliver all the classic vintage J-bass growl, punch, and single-coil character but with dead-silent, studio-grade performance.

They run into an elite Nordstrand 2B active preamp, providing incredibly smooth, musical layout controls:

  • Master Volume
  • Pickup Blend
  • Active 2-Band EQ: Smooth Bass and Treble cut/boost to dial in your exact sonic luxury.
  • Active Passive Switch
  • Fully Shielded Cavities: Meticulously shielded to ensure that your signal stays perfectly clean and free of undesirable venue RF noise or stage hum.

Redeemer 16V Smart Power System (High-Horsepower Engine):

No more hunting for 9V batteries or losing headroom when you step on the gas! This bass features our proprietary Redeemer 16V 4S Lithium-Ion battery system, acting like a supercharged V8 engine for your preamp. Need to charge on the go? It uses the exact same USB-C charger as any modern cell phone.

  • Massive Headroom: Running the active Nordstrand circuit with a max charge of 16.8V delivers incredible dynamic range and punch without changing your core tone. Slap, pop, and dig in as hard as you want—this engine has limitless headroom and will never clip.
  • USB-C Rechargeable: Fully integrated charging port—just plug it in between sets or at home. You can expect a massive play time of approximately 350 hours between charges, meaning you rarely ever have to pull over for a fill-up!
  • In a hurry? No time to charge? Don't worry, just pull the active/passive switch and keep on rolling in pure passive luxury.
  • LED Status Array: A flush 4-LED status indicator gives you a crystal-clear look at your current fuel levels at the press of a button, along with a dedicated charging status LED so you know exactly when you're topped off.

Dependable, Premium Gold Hardware:

To complete the high-end luxury package, the hardware is completely gold throughout. It features a high-mass Hipshot Mass Kicker Bridge for incredible string anchoring, deep resonance, and endless sustain. This is paired with world-class, ultra-lightweight Hipshot Ultralight Tuners to guarantee zero neck dive and flawless tuning stability.

Condition & Accessories

This bass has been fully set up, intonated, and bench-tested. It plays like butter with low action and zero buzz. It ships fully charged and ready to command the stage or studio.

  • Strings: Equipped with a brand new set of premium D'Addario XL Pro Steel Strings.
  • Strap Locks: Comes equipped with professional gold strap locks to protect your investment from accidents!
  • Case: A premium padded gig bag is included in the sale.
  • Tool Kit: The Allen keys required for truss rod and bridge adjustments are included.

About Redeemer Bass Guitars:

Behind every Redeemer Bass is Scott Coleman Sr, a solo luthier who has been hand-crafting elite bass guitars since 2005. Hand-built in Central Texas, USA, Redeemer Basses operates strictly on a low-scale, high-concept level—meaning mass production does not exist here. Every single build is a true "one-off" masterpiece, completely unique from anything that came before it.

Because production is strictly limited, owning a Redeemer Bass means owning a rare piece of functional art. Scott dedicates uncompromised time to the critical details that define a world-class instrument: Custom designs and options, single-cuts, dual-cuts, neck-throughs, bolt-ons, precision fretwork for ultra-low action, immaculate custom finishes, advanced electronic integration, and a rigorous bench setup.

While Scott has the engineering expertise to design and produce his own proprietary Redeemer-branded electronics and hardware systems, he also proudly teams up with the most respected names in the bass community—including Aguilar Amplification, Nordstrand Audio, Bartolini Pickups & Electronics, and Hipshot Products. This unique blend of custom shop innovation and industry-standard elite components ensures you get the exact tone, feel, and performance you desire. When you buy a Redeemer, you are buying a bespoke instrument engineered to perform flawlessly for a lifetime.

item.title: Aria Type Rickenbacker Made in Japan 70's - Fireglo — $2,388.31
item.description:
$2,388.31 · Good · Boutique de Anthony

​Basse Vintage Aria (Type Rickenbacker 4001) - Made in Japan 70's - À réviser

​Description :

​Bonjour,

​Je vends une authentique basse électrique vintage de la marque Aria, fabriquée au Japon dans les années 1970 (époque Lawsuit). Il s'agit d'une superbe réplique du modèle légendaire Rickenbacker 4001 en finition Fireglo.

​Pour les passionnés de lutherie japonaise de cette époque (Matsumoku), Aria est une référence incontournable pour la qualité de ses bois et de sa fabrication.

​État de l'instrument (Vendu en l'état / Projet de restauration) :

La basse est restée dans son jus et nécessite une révision complète ainsi qu'un changement de cordes (il manque actuellement une corde).

​Esthétique : Magnifique patine vintage. Quelques traces du temps et d'oxydation sur l'accastillage (micros, chevalet) qui lui donnent un vrai look Rock/Blues.

​Électronique & Réglages : À réviser entièrement (nettoyage des potentiomètres, vérification des soudures et planification/réglage du manche à prévoir).

​Idéal pour un luthier amateur, un collectionneur ou un musicien souhaitant s'offrir une superbe base "Lawsuit" japonaise à restaurer.

​A noter : Vendue seule, sans housse ni étui.

​

item.title: Rickenbacker 4003SW Bass 2026 - Walnut — $1,949
item.description:
$1,949 · Brand New · Andy Babiuk's Fab Gear

ON SALE FOR A LIMITED TIME - July 1st - 30th

NEW – This traditional Rickenbacker bass style with dot inlays and no binding was prized by Paul McCartney and Chris Squire when they got their first 4001S models in 1964. Players cherish its traditional look and rounded edges that many claim make it more comfortable than the 4003. The updated 4003S version comes with the improved bi-flex trussrod system. Of course, the famous solid bass tones, ringing sustain and treble punch we’re known for make it a dream. It’s no wonder they’ve received a steady demand of requests to bring this back.

This design was once exclusive to the British distributor Rose Morris in the six-ties. Iconic curves of maple form the body with a traditional Rosewood fingerboard. Dot inlays and no binding make this stand out from the standard 4003. The Vintage Tone Selector activates a capacitor in the treble pickup circuit to emphasize the high end. Pressed in, you get the familiar 4003 sound, pull it out to add bite and crispness.

The 4003S now boasts the new V.2 bass bridge pickup, delivering the same iconic Rickenbacker bass tone we all love, now with a newly designed pickup cover, enabling you to effortlessly access the strings from any position on the body. This bass comes with its official Rickenbacker Deluxe Hardshell Case.

Comes with an official Rickenbacker Deluxe Hardshell Case.

Note: Photos of stock instrument, Contact us for photos of exact serial number you'll receive.

IN STOCK AND READY TO SHIP!

Includes free shipping and free expert guitar setup!


SPECS

Neck

  • No. Frets: 20
  • Scale Length: 84.5 cm (33 1/4”)
  • Neck Width at Nut: 42.9 mm (1 11/16”)
  • Neck Width at 12th Fret: 54.0 mm (2 1/8”)
  • Crown Radius: 25.4 cm (10”)
  • Neck Type: Through body
  • Fret Marker Style: Dot
  • Fingerboard Wood: Maple
  • Neck Wood: Maple
  • Neck Binding: No

Body

  • Body Type: Solid
  • Body Wood: Walnut
  • Body Style: Cresting wave
  • Binding: None

Overall Dimensions

  • Weight: 4.1 kg (9.0 lbs.)
  • Overall Length: 113.8 cm (44 13/16”)
  • Overall Width: 34.3 cm (13 1/2”)
  • Overall Depth: 31.8 mm (1 1/4”)

Hardware

  • Tailpiece: RIC
  • Bridge: RIC
  • Machine Heads: Schaller Deluxe

Electronics

  • No. of Pickups: 2
  • Type of Pickups: Single Coil
  • Output Type: Mono

Case

  • Case Type: Deluxe Rickenbacker Hardshell Case

Misc.

  • Also Included: Polishing cloth, Warranty Information, Collectible Rickenbacker sticker, Owners Manual.

item.title: Sago 5 String Bass with Active Bartolini Electronics 2015-2020 - Gloss Laquer — $2,500
item.description:
$2,500 · Excellent · Andres Garcia Audio

SAGO, one of Japan's finest Bass builders.

awesome sound and action. Great weight and balance. You can get a great variety of sounds out of these electronics. Priced to sell fast.

Only reason I am selling it is financial situation.

item.title: Fender Jazz Parts Bass — $450
item.description:
$450 · Very Good · isellguitars444

fender alder body, jazz neck with 9.5" radius maple fingerboard and medium jumbo frets, 34" scale length, 1.5" nut width, unmarked cloth wire single coil pickups


I think the neck of the guitar and the body are from two different guitars, the person who made this was some nerd who put a lot of weird custom parts in it. There's also room for a "onboard preamp" or something? I don't know.


It comes with the bag and strap and a bunch of picks, I really just want this out of my apartment. its a really good instrument but ive honestly given up on ever playing an instrument live, i just give up.


fun fact there was a humming problem w the tone knob when i got it so i like, brought it back to them and they fixed it for free (replaced a capacitor) so it does actually work and sound great. should work well when you receive it if you buy it

item.title: Ibanez SR1805E Premium 5-String Bass w/ Soft Case (Pre-Owned) — $935
item.description:
$935 · Very Good · Bananas at Large®

Ibanez SR1805E Premium 5-String Bass w/ Soft Case (Pre-Owned)

The Ibanez Premium SR1805 is a high-end 5-string electric bass known for its boutique-style woods and smooth playability. It features a stunning rosewood and flamed maple top over a walnut and mahogany body. With premium electronics and a slim neck, it gives players a punchy, professional sound.

This bass is in Very Good Condition. An Ibanez Structured Soft Case is Included.

FEATURES
  • Serial Number: I 1706000685
  • 5-String Bass
  • Solid Ibanez SR1805E Double Cutaway Body
  • Walnut Core, Rosewood and Flamed Maple Top, Mahogany Back
  • Natural Flat Finish
  • Bolt-On 5-piece Atlas-5 Wenge/Bubinga Neck w/ KTS Titanium Rods
  • Rosewood Fingerboard
  • 305mm Radius
  • Graph Tech TUSQ Nut
  • 45mm Nut Width
  • 34 in. Scale
  • 24 Medium Frets with Premium Edge Treatment
  • Nordstrand Big Single 5 Bridge and Neck Pickups
  • Ibanez Custom EQB-IIISC 3-band EQ, with Mid Frequency Switch and EQ Bypass Switch
  • Global Volume Control, Pickup Balancer Control, 3-band EQ (bass/mid/treble) Controls
  • EQ Bypass Toggle Switch, 3-way Mid-Frequency Toggle Switch
  • Gotoh GB707 Tuners
  • Mono-Rail V Bridge
  • Gold Hardware Color
  • Ibanez Structured Soft Case 
  • Very Good Condition

Any questions, please ask!

*Legal Disclaimer: Due to the nature of Pre-Owned Products, Bananas At Large Inc. does not claim this instrument to be 100% original. Any Questions please ask before buying*

item.title: Schecter Stargazer 5 String Bass Crimson Ghost 2009 - Crimson Ghost — $599.99
item.description:
$599.99 · Good · Brian's Gear Garage

Rare find. Schecter Stargazer 5 string bass in crimson ghost. An absolute value of a guitar for the tone and playability. Also, bonus points for style with Schecter‘s version of a Rickenbacker.

Minor wear and tear. Needs a new set of strings. And one of the knobs came loose, but still have and will include. Comes with a Gator hard shell case, but the handle to the case is missing unfortunately.

item.title: Fender Bullet Deluxe Electric Bass w/OHSC (1980s - Vintage White) — $1,650
item.description:
$1,650 · Very Good · Jack's Guitarcheology

Make: Fender

Model: Bullet Deluxe

Finish: Vintage White

Set-up & Playability: Easy to play neck - wide and slim! Plays great! 

Case: Original Hardshell

Notes: This is really neat. Made from 1981 - 1983 these Bullet Deluxe bass models are slighty rare. Very unique and made in the USA at the Fender Fullerton factory!

Consignment Disclaimer: Like all my consignments, this thing is being sold "as described" regardless of condition. (See my shop policies for more information)

As always, we cleaned it up, polished the finish, flushed the electronics (if applicable), changed the strings, performed all routine maintenance and set the action low and smooth. All of our packages are packed tight enough to survive the apocalypse and we insure every parcel for the full purchase amount.

Got questions? Shoot me a message, I love nerding out with other gearheads!

item.title: Schecter Stiletto Studio-5 FL Active Fretless 5-String Bass 2010s - Honey Satin — $750
item.description:
$750 · Excellent · Kevin Sadler

Schecter Stiletto Studio 5 FL in excellent condition. This guitar was originally purchased in 2013 by myself. It has had very light use over its life. strings have just been replaced with Ernie Ball flat wounds. the fret board has been meticulously maintained with lemon oil to keep from shrinking. the bass plays excellent I just don't use it.
